domain: computability theory (Rice's theorem on undecidability of non-trivial semantic properties)
specific_mechanism: Rice's-theorem impossibility argument applied to self-modifying LLM agents
llm_application: claim: no non-trivial safety property of a self-modifying LLM agent is decidable
novelty_claim: specific bridge to Rice's theorem for the self-modification case (vs the standard Halting-Problem framings used for static alignment)
